CFS Forms Autofill Dashboard

Upload or save CFS form templates, then upload the Client Review / Fact Find Word document, choose the client, and generate prefilled CFS PDFs.
0. Saved CFS Form Templates
Checking saved forms...

The dashboard already contains the original CFS forms. This option lets another user upload their own ZIP folder of blank CFS PDFs once and save them in their browser for future use. Saved forms stay on that computer/browser only.

1. Upload Fact Find / Client Review

This dashboard reads the Word document text, detects the clients listed on the first page, and extracts DOB, address, mobile, email, adviser and basic account information where available.

Clients detected:

2. Review extracted details

3. Bank / Fee / Adviser Details

Signature fields and date-signed fields are intentionally left blank.

4. Spouse contribution split details
5. Select forms

Use Chrome or Edge for best results.
